iterations.name: 🔍 AUDITED: BRatio+MROT+0DTE (30% risk cap, fixed MTM)
audit_notes: BUG FIXED: value_backratio no longer floors at 0
BUG FIXED: VIX emergency exit no longer uses max(proc,0)
30% risk cap enforced on every trade entry
Back-ratio stop-loss at 80% of max loss

constraints: v4 AUDITED: Fixed back-ratio MTM, VIX exit, 30% risk cap enforced. Honest results.
audit_bugs_found: value_backratio max(2*c2-c1, 0) floored negative MTM — hid losses
VIX emergency exit max(proc, 0) erased underwater position losses
No risk tracking or cap enforcement existed in v3
